notes: Current GG already has an active Pinwheel enemy.
Closest current GG counterpart is Rhombus.
Shape/family aligns, but naming and score differ.
Current GG Square exists, but the original also distinguishes Cubie the Cube as a child/split form.
Current GG Square2 covers the child role, but naming/score tuning differ.
Current GG Circle exists only as a child spawned from BlackHole overload, not as an active spawn-pool enemy.
Current GG BlackHole is much more elite/boss-like than the original Grid Wars scoring suggests.
No active Snake equivalent in the current GG roster.
No active Interceptor/Clone equivalent in the current GG roster.
Triangle enemy source exists in GG but is not wired into pools/factory.
No active Butterfly equivalent in the current GG roster.
Current GG uses a procedural vector ship rather than the original sprite.
Current GG uses a red vector bullet rather than the original yellow sprite.
